message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 用户切换流程

participant "客户端" as Client
participant "AMS" as AMS
participant "UserControl" as UC

' 注册回调接口
Client -> AMS: registerUserSwitchObserver(IUserSwitchObserver)
note right of Client: 注册回调接口

AMS -> UC: registerUserSwitchObserver(IUserSwitchObserver)

' 开始切换用户
Client -> AMS: switchUser()
AMS --x> UC: startUser()
note right of AMS: 执行切换用户动作，发送REPORT_USER_SWITCH_MSG

UC <- UC: dispatchUserSwitch

' 通知客户端处理中
UC -> Client: IUserSwitchObserver.onUserSwitching(newUserId, callback)
note right of Client: 通知客户端处理完用户切换后回调传递的callback来通知AMS

Client --x> UC: IRemoteCallback.sendResult()
note right of Client: 等待所有客户端处理完成之后继续进行切换用户的工作

' 继续切换
UC <- UC: continueUserSwitch()
note right of AMS: 结束冻屏，并停止在后台的访客用户

UC <- UC: dispatchUserSwitchComplete()
note right of AMS: 通过回调方法通知客户端进行用户切换的收尾工作

' 通知客户端完成
UC -> Client: IUserSwitchObserver.onUserSwitchComplete(userId)

@enduml
```
